creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Brandon,

Thanks for your submission and interest

From your mail I assume this is probably the first time you submit a port
change, there is nothing wrong about that, but having you changes successfully
merged in the tree could require a few extra steps and work than you could
expect. Don't worry we are here to guide and help you.

We have a reference document about ports called the Porter Handbook who give
the key steps when working with ports. If you didn't check it yet, I encourage
you to do so: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook

Also to improve readability, can you submit a single patch with you all your
changes for this port which doesn't require to apply your previous submissions ?

Cheers,
-- rodrigo
